speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, good. I also need all of you to roll a wisdom saving throw, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (quietly) How does he do that? How did you do that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You also watch as about 25 or so of these figures at the top all collapse at once.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But some are left.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There are some left. You watch and very faintly, you can see on that altar in the center, there is a small bead of pure, vibrant, bright white light. You watch as a robed figure that previously was held in the shadows emerge. You're too far away to make any more details than that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: A lot of motherfuckers just died on the top of that tower. You felt that?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What do we do? Is that the end of the ritual?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How much time left on that hour, buddy?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Enough to get back to our friends, probably.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We've got to go.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Should we attack now? Just the two of us?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, we should not do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We could.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We could.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Between you and me, we're the most powerful ones in the group.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I just don't feel like freeballing it right now, and I'd really like the group.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I know, but will you at least confirm that yes, we are the most powerful?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Clearly. We are the most, as the kids say, OP. Let's get back to the group.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right. Hold me tight. Mr. Mistoffeles, back down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It goes into a rapid dive, making its way back towards where you left the rest of your party. The rest of you, you can go ahead and regain your short rest. You get your Wild Shape back. You can spend any hit dice to heal up if you'd like. If you haven't already.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I already did it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I would like you all to roll initiative. (screaming)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Bitchface Briarwood.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Bitchface Briarwood!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: On this side, you see what appears to be a black, armored, massive, not quite goliath-sized, but a thick, dark black knight of jagged dark metal armor, what appears to be a longsword that emanates this dark energy, and floating above--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, balls.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no, what's flying?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Put it away.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, I don't need it!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Those are my platforms, I can take them back anytime I want!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no! What is that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You see a man, though the flesh is pulled tight against a skeletal frame. You see long, red and purple and black robes that are tattered and drift below the breeze and cold gently blowing by. You see a field of crackling energy just bursting around the outskirts of his form. You see one hand is out, in a welcoming position, while the empty wrist that once contained a hand is now open on the other side. You see the bald, hairless head, which is covered in spots and tugged open, bits of flesh that have curled away from rotten decay. You see the cheeks sunken in where the skeletal teeth are now emblazoned in a terrible grin. You see the right eye, and the gaping hole where a bright green, bursting, flaming vacuous void where an eye once was now drifts off a trail behind it. You see there, reborn before you, the Whispered One, the Undying King. Vecna himself.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh god, we're in it!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't like it being this close.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We'll probably all die.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You get a d12 that you can spend on something. Which, as you release Revivify, you reach down and grab the cold, lifeless hand of Vex. I need you to roll a wisdom check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That was a 16 and a one, so with his constitution bonus, he saves. He maintains concentration.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh my fucking god!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's hard to break. He was designed for that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to use my bonus action to reload, and that's my fucking turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That was a long turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I know.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You did good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. End of Percy's turn. Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Percy, do you want to move on your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No. There's nowhere. I'm as far away from everybody as I can currently be. There's nowhere else.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'm letting you know, as it currently stands. Delilah's down.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Delilah's down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And two figures that look pretty much untouched. Scanlan?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What are you trying to say?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'm saying, be mindful of your choices.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You know what? I'm going to start making a beeline straight for Keyleth. Fuck it. I'm going to see if I can get some cover behind--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Are we going to bail? What do we do?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm fucking bailing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's up to you. You do have one of them down, and you have two--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: If you can bail--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We can get Grog back. We've just got to get everybody up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You don't even know where I am.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You can find him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What about you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm gone. There's no finding me. I'm gone.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're picking up armor.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I grab Pikey-poo and Dimension Door straight to Vex's beautiful dead body.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Like a dead Juliet.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will inspire Pike. I don't know if that helps whatever ritual you're about to do, but maybe.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Revivify.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What do you get if you're inspired?
